summary: Completed testing of sponsor names and logos feature. All 9 backend tests passed. Frontend Admin Settings page and Live Screen verified - sponsor names (SGCCI, SBC) display correctly in footer banner.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/public/branding returns sponsor_logo_1, sponsor_logo_2, sponsor_name_1, sponsor_name_2 fields
Backend: GET /api/public/branding returns existing sponsor names (SGCCI, SBC)
Backend: GET /api/admin/settings returns settings data
Backend: PUT /api/admin/settings can save sponsor_name_1
Backend: PUT /api/admin/settings can save sponsor_name_2
Backend: PUT /api/admin/settings can save both sponsor names at once
Backend: PUT /api/admin/settings requires authentication (401/403 without token)
Backend: POST /api/admin/upload-logo accepts logo_type=sponsor_logo_1
Backend: POST /api/admin/upload-logo accepts logo_type=sponsor_logo_2
Frontend: Admin Settings page shows 'Dashboard Sponsors' section
Frontend: Admin Settings page has Sponsor 1 Name input (data-testid='sponsor-name-1-input')
Frontend: Admin Settings page has Sponsor 2 Name input (data-testid='sponsor-name-2-input')
Frontend: Admin Settings page has sponsor_logo_1 upload button
Frontend: Admin Settings page has sponsor_logo_2 upload button
Frontend: Admin can type sponsor names and save successfully (Settings saved toast appears)
Frontend: Live Screen authenticates with password 'ssnc2026'
Frontend: Live Screen shows event selection dropdown
Frontend: Live Screen displays sponsor banner at bottom (data-testid='sponsor-banner')
Frontend: Live Screen shows sponsor 1 display with name 'SGCCI' (data-testid='sponsor-name-1-text')
Frontend: Live Screen shows sponsor 2 display with name 'SBC' (data-testid='sponsor-name-2-text')
Frontend: Live Screen shows sponsor logos alongside names

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all UI elements verified, sponsor names display correctly on Live Screen)

seed_data_creation: Uploaded test sponsor logos (1x1 pixel red and blue PNG images) during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sponsor feature fully implemented and tested. Key endpoints: GET /api/public/branding returns sponsor_name_1, sponsor_name_2, sponsor_logo_1, sponsor_logo_2. PUT /api/admin/settings saves sponsor names. POST /api/admin/upload-logo?logo_type=sponsor_logo_1|sponsor_logo_2 uploads logos. Admin Settings page has 'Dashboard Sponsors' section with two text inputs for names and two upload buttons for logos. Live Screen displays sponsor banner at bottom with logos and names. Current sponsor names are SGCCI and SBC.
